events.name: Electric Callboy: Tanzneid World Tour
events.description: German electronicore band Electric Callboy brings their high-energy Tanzneid World Tour to Seattle. Expect an electrifying set with hits plus new releases like 'Elevator Operator' and 'Revery.'

events.name: Beauz
events.description: Electronic music performance at the iconic Showbox venue.

events.name: Pat Metheny
events.description: Legendary jazz guitarist Pat Metheny performs a multi-night residency at Dimitriou's Jazz Alley.

events.name: César Franck — Symphony in D minor
events.description: Classical music performance featuring Franck's Symphony in D minor. Tickets $40.50-$155.50.

events.name: Seattle Seawolves vs. Chicago Hounds
events.description: Major League Rugby match as the Seattle Seawolves host the Chicago Hounds. 'Run with the Pack' fan event.

events.name: Washington Huskies Softball vs. UCLA Bruins
events.description: NCAA softball matchup between the Washington Huskies and UCLA Bruins.

events.name: Cooper Tires PBR Tacoma
events.description: Professional Bull Riders event featuring top bull riding action.

events.name: Dude Dad's Parents Night Out
events.description: Comedy show by Dude Dad (Taylor Calmus), featuring his popular parenting humor. Ages 18+.

events.name: Chelcie Lynn - Trailer Trash Tammy
events.description: Stand-up comedy from Chelcie Lynn, known for her viral 'Trailer Trash Tammy' character.

events.name: Sweet Charity
events.description: High-energy 1960s musical set in New York. Tony Award-winning production.

events.name: Victorian Heritage Festival
events.description: Annual festival featuring walking tours, teas, opening houses, Victorian fashion show, and contra dance. Festival headquarters at Cotton Building, 607 Water St.

events.name: Evergreen Spring Home Show
events.description: Spring home show featuring vendors, demonstrations, and home improvement exhibits.

events.name: City Nature Challenge - Guided Walk
events.venue: Delridge Community Center Outdoor Space, Seattle
events.description: Participate in a guided walk to learn about the City Nature Challenge as part of Earth Month activities with Seattle Parks and Recreation.

events.name: Washington State Annual History Awards
events.description: Annual awards honoring writers, educators, and cultural leaders shaping how Washington State understands its past.

events.name: Skagit Valley Tulip Festival
events.description: Annual tulip festival featuring colorful tulip fields, art shows, and community events throughout the Skagit Valley.
